name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AkasicDB
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

<!--
Before submitting a feature request, please check the existing issues to see if the feature has already been requested.
-->

## Feature Description
Clearly describe the feature or improvement you are suggesting.

## Justification
Explain why this feature would be beneficial and how it would improve the user experience or functionality of AkasicDB.

## Additional Context
Provide any additional information, examples, or use cases that would help illustrate the need for this feature.
